# Contact Page

## Purpose
Communication hub for inquiries, partnerships, and community engagement.

## Structure

### Main Form
- Full Name field
- Email Address field
- Message textarea
- Submit button: "SEND TRANSMISSION"

### Side Panels

#### Newsletter Signup
- Email input
- Join button
- Dark blue background with yellow accents

#### Social Media Links
- LinkedIn
- Twitter/X
- Instagram

## Use Cases
- Consulting inquiries
- Media inquiries
- Technical questions about tropical architecture

- [[Network Page]] — Partnerships and pilot sites
